raw.subject: Your Gastonia page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I've been driving around Gastonia quite a bit lately, and I love seeing all the well-maintained cars. Your posts about making customers' cars shine really stood out to me. You have a great team!

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be leaving potential customers like me missing out on information about your services and contact details.

I sketched a quick homepage idea that brings together the services overview, photo gallery, and contact section from your Facebook posts. It's a simple way to showcase your expertise and make it easy for people to get in touch.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/z-d-mobile-detailing-llc-gastonia

I'd love to chat with you about bringing this idea to life. It's a straightforward project with a flat fee for local businesses like yours. If you're interested, I'd be happy to send over a quote and we can discuss further.

Reply to this email or let's schedule a quick call to go over the details.
